MTT_viability.name: MTT Cell Viability Assay
MTT_viability.description: Colorimetric assay measuring mitochondrial reductase activity as a proxy for cell viability. MTT tetrazolium is reduced to purple formazan crystals by living cells.

reagents.name: Thiazolyl Blue Tetrazolium Bromide (MTT)
reagents.stock_preparation: Dissolve 5 mg/mL in sterile PBS. Filter-sterilize through 0.22 um. Store at 4C protected from light. Stable for 4 weeks.

reagent_steps.description: Seed cells in 96-well plate
reagent_steps.notes: Allow cells to adhere overnight

reagent_steps.description: Add compound dilutions to wells
reagent_steps.notes: Final DMSO concentration must be below 0.5%

reagent_steps.description: Add MTT solution (5 mg/mL stock) to each well
reagent_steps.notes: Do not remove existing medium. Incubate at 37C, 5% CO2

reagent_steps.description: Remove medium carefully, add DMSO to dissolve formazan
reagent_steps.notes: Shake plate for 15 min at room temperature to fully dissolve crystals

reagent_steps.description: Read absorbance at 570 nm
reagent_steps.notes: Reference wavelength 690 nm optional for background subtraction

controls.description: Cells treated with 10% DMSO (cytotoxic positive control)

resazurin_viability.name: Resazurin (alamarBlue) Cell Viability Assay
resazurin_viability.description: Fluorometric assay where resazurin (blue, non-fluorescent) is reduced to resorufin (pink, fluorescent) by viable cells. Non-destructive, allowing repeated measurements.

reagents.name: alamarBlue Cell Viability Reagent
reagents.stock_preparation: Ready to use. Store at 4C protected from light.

reagent_steps.description: Seed cells in 96-well plate
reagent_steps.notes: Allow cells to adhere overnight

reagent_steps.description: Add compound dilutions to wells
reagent_steps.notes: Final DMSO below 0.5%

reagent_steps.description: Add alamarBlue reagent to each well
reagent_steps.notes: Add 10% v/v of total well volume. Incubate at 37C, 5% CO2

reagent_steps.description: Read fluorescence (Ex 560 / Em 590 nm)
reagent_steps.notes: Can also read absorbance at 570/600 nm if fluorescence reader unavailable

fluorescence_polarization.name: Fluorescence Polarization Binding Assay
fluorescence_polarization.description: Measures binding of a fluorescent tracer to a protein target. Bound tracer rotates slowly (high polarization), free tracer rotates quickly (low polarization). Displacement by test compound indicates binding.

reagents.name: FITC-labeled tracer peptide
reagents.stock_preparation: Dissolve to 1 mM in DMSO. Aliquot and store at -80C. Working: 10 nM in assay buffer.

reagents.name: Assay buffer (20 mM HEPES, 150 mM NaCl, 0.01% Triton X-100, pH 7.4)
reagents.stock_preparation: Prepare fresh. Filter through 0.22 um. Adjust pH to 7.4.

reagents.name: Purified target protein
reagents.stock_preparation: Dilute to 2x final concentration in assay buffer. Use Kd concentration.

reagent_steps.description: Add assay buffer to black 384-well plate
reagent_steps.notes: Use black, low-volume, non-binding surface plates (e.g., Corning 3575)

reagent_steps.description: Add compound dilutions
reagent_steps.notes: Serial dilution in assay buffer. Final DMSO below 1%

reagent_steps.description: Add purified target protein
reagent_steps.notes: Mix gently. Pre-incubate compound with protein for 15 min at RT

reagent_steps.description: Add FITC-labeled tracer
reagent_steps.notes: Final tracer concentration 10 nM. Incubate 1 hr at RT in the dark

reagent_steps.description: Read fluorescence polarization (Ex 485 / Em 535 nm)
reagent_steps.notes: Read in polarization mode. Report mP values.

controls.description: Known inhibitor at saturating concentration (displaces tracer)
DMSO vehicle (tracer fully bound to protein)

ELISA.name: Enzyme-Linked Immunosorbent Assay
ELISA.description: Quantitative immunoassay for detecting and measuring proteins, peptides, antibodies, and hormones. Uses enzyme-linked antibodies and colorimetric substrates.

reagents.name: Capture antibody
reagents.stock_preparation: Dilute in coating buffer (0.05M carbonate/bicarbonate pH 9.6) per manufacturer instructions

reagents.name: TMB Substrate Solution
reagents.stock_preparation: Ready to use. Equilibrate to room temperature before use.

reagent_steps.description: Coat plate with capture antibody, incubate overnight at 4C
reagent_steps.notes: Use high-binding 96-well plate (e.g., Corning 9018)

reagent_steps.description: Block with 1% BSA in PBS-T for 1 hour
reagent_steps.notes: Wash 3x with PBS-T between steps

reagent_steps.description: Add samples and standards
reagent_steps.notes: Incubate at room temperature with gentle shaking

reagent_steps.description: Add detection antibody (HRP-conjugated)
reagent_steps.notes: Wash 3x before adding. Dilute per manufacturer specs.

reagent_steps.description: Add TMB substrate
reagent_steps.notes: Develop in dark for 15-30 min until blue color develops

reagent_steps.description: Add stop solution and read at 450 nm
reagent_steps.notes: Read within 30 min of stopping

controls.description: Recombinant protein standard at known concentration

qPCR.name: Quantitative Real-Time PCR
qPCR.description: Measures gene expression changes via reverse transcription and real-time PCR amplification with fluorescent reporters (SYBR Green or TaqMan probes).

reagents.name: Power SYBR Green PCR Master Mix
reagents.stock_preparation: Ready to use 2x mix. Store at -20C. Thaw on ice before use.

reagents.name: RNeasy Mini Kit (RNA extraction)
reagents.stock_preparation: Follow kit protocol for RNA isolation

reagents.name: High-Capacity cDNA Reverse Transcription Kit
reagents.stock_preparation: Follow kit protocol. Use 1 ug total RNA per reaction.

reagent_steps.description: Treat cells with compound for specified duration
reagent_steps.notes: Use 6-well or 12-well plates for sufficient RNA yield

reagent_steps.description: Extract total RNA using RNeasy kit
reagent_steps.notes: Include DNase treatment. Check RNA quality (260/280 > 1.8)

reagent_steps.description: Reverse transcribe 1 ug RNA to cDNA
reagent_steps.notes: 25C 10 min, 37C 120 min, 85C 5 min

reagent_steps.description: Set up qPCR reactions in 96-well PCR plate
reagent_steps.notes: 10 uL SYBR mix + 1 uL each primer (10 uM) + 2 uL cDNA + 6 uL water

reagent_steps.description: Run qPCR program: 95C 10 min, 40 cycles (95C 15s, 60C 1 min)
reagent_steps.notes: Include melt curve analysis. Use GAPDH or ACTB as housekeeping gene.

controls.description: Known inducer of target gene expression

luciferase_reporter.name: Luciferase Reporter Gene Assay
luciferase_reporter.description: Measures transcriptional activity of a pathway by driving luciferase expression from a pathway-responsive promoter. Bioluminescence is proportional to pathway activation.

reagents.name: Dual-Luciferase Reporter Assay System
reagents.stock_preparation: Reconstitute LAR II: dissolve lyophilized substrate in LAR II buffer. Prepare Stop & Glo: add 1:50 substrate to Stop & Glo buffer.

reagents.name: Passive Lysis Buffer (5x)
reagents.stock_preparation: Dilute to 1x with water before use.

reagent_steps.description: Seed reporter cells in 96-well plate
reagent_steps.notes: Use cells stably or transiently transfected with reporter construct

reagent_steps.description: Add compound dilutions
reagent_steps.notes: Final DMSO below 0.5%. Include pathway activator as positive control.

reagent_steps.description: Remove medium, add 1x Passive Lysis Buffer
reagent_steps.notes: Rock plate for 15 min at room temperature

reagent_steps.description: Add LAR II reagent and read firefly luminescence
reagent_steps.notes: Read immediately after addition. 10 sec integration time.

reagent_steps.description: Add Stop & Glo reagent and read Renilla luminescence
reagent_steps.notes: Renilla serves as internal normalization control

controls.description: Known pathway activator (e.g., TNF-alpha for NF-kB, Wnt3a for Wnt)
